_meta.updated: 2026-04-09 (v1.3: fixed hvV79Si/fUBheHs collision + added audit_plan.py runtime)
_meta.purpose: Hand-curated patches to exercise_db_final.json. Applied at load time by scripts/build_safe_pool.py. Original DB remains unchanged.
_meta.curator: Claude Opus 4.6 — ArishaFit fitness-training-plan skill v6.4
_meta.scope: Fixes for exercises actually used in iter1-5 plans + 20 elite gymnastic IDs + T21/T22/T25 smoke test coverage. Not a comprehensive DB rewrite.
_meta.v11_additions: Extended name_overrides to cover 27 additional duplicate families: 'Приседание в Смите', 'Выпад с гантелями', 'Приседание со штангой', 'Скручивание на блоке', 'Задняя дельта на блоке', 'Приседание с гантелями', 'Тяга на блоке', 'Сгибание с гантелями', 'Тяга (становая) с гантелями', 'Жим с гантелями сидя', 'Сгибание с гантелями одной рукой сидя', 'Жим лёжа со штангой', 'Задняя дельта с гантелями', 'Разведение на блоке'
_meta.v12_additions: Pattern-based exclusion rules (exclude_by_pattern_if_condition) for fibromyalgia/osteopenia/HTN/lumbar/knee_OA/pregnancy — catches impact/axial_load patterns automatically
_meta.v13_fixes: Fixed collision: hvV79Si (patched to 'Тяга нижнего блока сидя') conflicted with fUBheHs (original 'Тяга нижнего блока сидя'). Now disambiguated: hvV79Si='Тяга нижнего блока сидя (низкое положение)', fUBheHs='Тяга нижнего блока сидя (базовая)'. Caught by audit_plan.py counterfactual test on T17 iter5 plan.

global_blacklist._description: NEVER use these exerciseIds for ANY fitness client. Elite calisthenics/gymnastics requiring 5+ years specialized training. Skill must exclude at selection step.

ids.pZwUsKB: iron cross stretch — implies iron cross target
ids.znf7t8E: kipping muscle up with triple — advanced

db_quality_blacklist._description: Broken DB entries (missing GIF, wrong data). Already known from iter3 lesson 12.

ids.tuIZFDt: hasGif: false — GIF file missing locally; plus nameRu='Планка' is generic/truncated

exclude_by_pattern_if_condition._description: Pattern-based exclusion (added v1.2 after T22 fibromyalgia smoke test). If client has the listed condition, exclude ALL exercises whose movementPatterns contain ANY of the specified patterns. More efficient than listing IDs individually.

rules.reason: PEM (post-exertional malaise) trigger — high-impact exercises forbidden per Clauw 2014, NICE 2021
Fracture risk — avoid plyometric/jump loading per ACSM 2018 (LIFTMOR uses controlled high-load, not impact)
BP spike + cardiac stress — no plyometrics per ACSM 2018

Disc shear under impact + axial compression + lumbar flexion under load (bent-over rows, deadlifts) + rotation under load (twists, wood chops) — ALL forbidden per SKILL.md v6 Lumbar Hernia section. Fixed in v1.4 after discovering 78 back_flexion + 32 rotation_under_load exercises leaked into lumbar hernia safe pool.
ACOG 2020 — no high-impact, no spinal flexion under load
Diastasis recti: no crunches (back_flexion), no impact. Planks excluded via conditional_forbidden IDs (not pattern — Dead Bug has plank_static but IS safe for diastasis).

exclude_verified_positions.reason: Standing bent-over = lumbar flexion under load. Caught 14 exercises where DB tags said supported_back but GIF showed bent-over. Visual review iter6.
Fracture risk with spinal flexion under load

Overhead PRESSING above 90deg = subacromial compression. Behind-neck = extreme external rotation + compression. Both forbidden. Note: lat pulldowns (pull DOWN to chest) are CAUTION not forbidden — start position is overhead but movement is downward under control. Verified by GIF visual review.
Behind-neck loading = cervical spine compression. Forbidden per SKILL.md.
Floor exercises impractical for BMI 40+ — difficulty getting up/down, fall risk. Use seated/standing/machine alternatives.

conditional_forbidden._description: Specific IDs forbidden only for specific client conditions. Skill checks client.conditions and excludes accordingly. For pattern-based exclusion see exclude_by_pattern_if_condition above.

knee_OA_any_grade.my33uHU: lever leg extension — OARSI 2019 contraindicated for knee OA

knee_OA_grade_2_plus.my33uHU: lever leg extension — stronger evidence for grade 2+

hypermobility_EDS.my33uHU: lever leg extension — knee hyperextension risk
hypermobility_EDS.Krmb3cB: lever reverse hyperextension — spinal hyperextension risk in EDS
hypermobility_EDS.OrETs32: reverse hyper on flat bench — same

ACL_reconstruction_0_3_months.76vfTdU: step-up with bicep curl — platform height violation + misleading name
ACL_reconstruction_0_3_months.RRWFUcw: dumbbell lunge — deep knee flexion too early

ACL_reconstruction_3_6_months.76vfTdU: step-up with bicep curl — still early for step-ups

shoulder_impingement.8ARQ9Hw: kettlebell sumo high pull — upright row pattern, arms above shoulder, subacromial compression
shoulder_impingement.6cKQC5E: dumbbell one arm upright row — same
shoulder_impingement.1oE78pm: core barbell upright row v2 — same

rotator_cuff_tear.1oE78pm: core barbell upright row v2 — same

lumbar_hernia.RKjH6Lt: dynamic side bridge v2 — disc shear risk

lumbar_hernia.8d8qJQI: barbell reverse grip incline bench row — GIF=STANDING BENT-OVER, nameRu says 'на наклонной скамье' but NO BENCH in GIF. Name LIES. Visual review.
lumbar_hernia.dmgMp3n: barbell incline row — GIF=STANDING BENT-OVER, nameRu says 'на наклонной скамье' but NO BENCH. Name LIES. Visual review.

lumbar_hernia.e25F58f: dumbbell one arm reverse fly (with support) — GIF=STANDING BENT-OVER. Visual review.

lumbar_hernia.Nh3mvOO: dumbbell reverse grip row female — GIF=DEEP BENT-OVER with dumbbells. No back_flexion tag. Visual review round 2.
lumbar_hernia.g9AsZ8P: kettlebell one arm row — GIF=STANDING BENT-OVER with kettlebell. Visual review round 2.

lumbar_hernia.r0z6xzQ: barbell pendlay row — GIF=DEEP BENT-OVER with barbell. No back_flexion tag. Visual review round 2.

diastasis_recti._note: Dead Bug (iny3m5y) is NOT here — it's SAFE for diastasis with controlled breathing. Bird-Dog also safe.

severe_obesity_bmi40.5VXmnV5: incline side plank — floor-based. Use cable/machine core instead.

canonical_id_preference._description: When multiple IDs are semantically equivalent (truly the same exercise, just different DB entries), prefer this ID. Format: family -> canonical_id. Others in family can still be used but canonical should be first choice.

level_overrides._description: Add level metadata to exercises that were unlabeled in original DB. elite = never for general clients; advanced = intermediate+; intermediate = default; beginner = safe for newcomers.

verified_positions._description: Visual GIF verification of actual body position (v1.5). Position categories: seated, lying, standing_upright, standing_bent_over, kneeling, machine_fixed, floor_bridge, floor_plank. Verified by Opus reading GIF files. Used by conditions to exclude dangerous positions without per-ID lists.
verified_positions._comment_overhead_press: Exercises where arms PRESS above shoulder level (overhead presses). FORBIDDEN for shoulder impingement/rotator cuff. Note: lat PULLDOWNS are NOT here — pulldown start position is above head but movement is downward = CAUTION not forbidden.
verified_positions._comment_behind_neck: Exercises where GIF shows bar/handle going behind neck. Forbidden for shoulder impingement AND cervical hernia. SpsOSXk = cable rear pulldown behind neck.

intent_flags._description: Flag exercises where the primary intent (targetMuscle) differs from what the nameRu suggests. These require explicit verification before use.

76vfTdU.reason: nameEn='dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl', targetMusclesRu=['Бицепс']

wkgnGfb.reason: nameEn='dumbbell incline hammer press on exercise ball' but bodyParts=['Руки'], targetMuscles=['Трицепс']
